'''鈭歯g-s-r''' ('''kangasar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeng|zeng]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-s-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeng|zeng]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-s-r
|-
! Lemma
| kangasar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingasar|thingasar]] || [[word:jingasar|jingasar]] || [[word:shingasar|shingasar]] || [[word:kingasar|kingasar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungasar|thuthungasar]] || [[word:jujungasar|jujungasar]] || [[word:shushungasar|shushungasar]] || [[word:kukungasar|kukungasar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungasar|thungasar]] || [[word:jungasar|jungasar]] || [[word:shungasar|shungasar]] || [[word:kungasar|kungasar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungasar|thungasar]] || [[word:jungasar|jungasar]] || [[word:shungasar|shungasar]] || [[word:kungasar|kungasar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengasar|thengasar]] || [[word:jengasar|jengasar]] || [[word:shengasar|shengasar]] || [[word:kengasar|kengasar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongasar|thothongasar]] || [[word:jojongasar|jojongasar]] || [[word:shoshongasar|shoshongasar]] || [[word:kokongasar|kokongasar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongasar|thongasar]] || [[word:jongasar|jongasar]] || [[word:shongasar|shongasar]] || [[word:kongasar|kongasar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongasar|thongasar]] || [[word:jongasar|jongasar]] || [[word:shongasar|shongasar]] || [[word:kongasar|kongasar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngasar|ngasar]] || [[word:ngasar|ngasar]] || [[word:ngasar|ngasar]] || [[word:ngasar|ngasar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngasar|ngasar]] || [[word:ngasar|ngasar]] || [[word:ngasar|ngasar]] || [[word:ngasar|ngasar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngasar|ngasar]] || [[word:ngasar|ngasar]] || [[word:ngasar|ngasar]] || [[word:ngasar|ngasar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngasar|ngasar]] || [[word:ngasar|ngasar]] || [[word:ngasar|ngasar]] || [[word:ngasar|ngasar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngasar|th忙ngasar]] || [[word:j忙ngasar|j忙ngasar]] || [[word:sh忙ngasar|sh忙ngasar]] || [[word:k忙ngasar|k忙ngasar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangasar|thathangasar]] || [[word:jajangasar|jajangasar]] || [[word:shashangasar|shashangasar]] || [[word:kakangasar|kakangasar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangasar|thangasar]] || [[word:jangasar|jangasar]] || [[word:shangasar|shangasar]] || [[word:kangasar|kangasar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangasar|thangasar]] || [[word:jangasar|jangasar]] || [[word:shangasar|shangasar]] || [[word:kangasar|kangasar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangasar|shangasar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangasar|goshangasar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangasar|gokishangasar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangasarn眉|shangasarn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangasarnkn眉|goshangasarnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangasarn眉|gokishangasarn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangasarsh毛|shangasarsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangasarnksh毛|goshangasarnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangasarsh毛|gokishangasarsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangasarro|shangasarro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangasarnkro|goshangasarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangasarro|gokishangasarro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangasarmu|shangasarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangasarnkmu|goshangasarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangasarmu|gokishangasarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangasarsher|shangasarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangasarnksher|goshangasarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangasarsher|gokishangasarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangasarng|shangasarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangasarnkng|goshangasarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangasarng|gokishangasarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangasarya|shangasarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangasarnkya|goshangasarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangasarya|gokishangasarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangasaryam|shangasaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangasarnkyam|goshangasarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangasaryam|gokishangasaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangasarn眉sh毛|shangasarn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangasarnkn眉sh毛|goshangasarnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangasarn眉sh毛|gokishangasarn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangasarn眉ro|shangasarn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangasarnkn眉ro|goshangasarnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangasarn眉ro|gokishangasarn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangasarn眉mu|shangasarn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangasarnkn眉mu|goshangasarnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangasarn眉mu|gokishangasarn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangasarsh毛n眉|shangasarsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangasarnksh毛n眉|goshangasarnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangasarsh毛n眉|gokishangasarsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangasarsh毛ro|shangasarsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangasarnksh毛ro|goshangasarnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangasarsh毛ro|gokishangasarsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangasarsh毛mu|shangasarsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangasarnksh毛mu|goshangasarnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangasarsh毛mu|gokishangasarsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangasarron眉|shangasarron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangasarnkron眉|goshangasarnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangasarron眉|gokishangasarron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangasarrosh毛|shangasarrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangasarnkrosh毛|goshangasarnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangasarrosh毛|gokishangasarrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangasarromu|shangasarromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangasarnkromu|goshangasarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangasarromu|gokishangasarromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangasarmun眉|shangasarmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangasarnkmun眉|goshangasarnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangasarmun眉|gokishangasarmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangasarmush毛|shangasarmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangasarnkmush毛|goshangasarnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangasarmush毛|gokishangasarmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangasarmuro|shangasarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangasarnkmuro|goshangasarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangasarmuro|gokishangasarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|17228b0}}
